use_cases: Toggle boolean settings or feature flags in application interfaces
Enable or disable notifications and preferences in user settings
Control binary on/off states in configuration panels
ai_summary: A minimalist toggle switch component built with Ark UI and styled with Tailwind CSS. Features a rounded pill-shaped track that transitions from gray to blue when activated, with a white thumb that slides horizontally. Includes accessible focus states and dark mode support for versatile integration across light and dark themes.
